title: PDF to PowerPoint — Recover Editable Slides
h1: Convert PDF to PowerPoint Presentation Offline
description: Transform PDF documents back into editable .pptx presentations locally. No cloud needed. Perfect for users in Beijing.

sections.title: Why Convert PDF to PowerPoint Offline?
sections.content: Recovering slide content from a PDF for editing should not require uploading sensitive decks to a cloud service.

sections.title: How to Convert PDF to PowerPoint

steps.title: Upload PDF
steps.description: Select the PDF containing your slide content.

steps.title: Map Pages to Slides
steps.description: Each PDF page becomes one editable slide.

steps.title: Download .pptx
steps.description: Get your fully editable PowerPoint presentation.

sections.title: Slide Recovery in Beijing
sections.content: Presenters in Beijing use our tool to recover and re-edit presentations from old PDF archives.

sections.title: Your Slides Are Never Exposed
sections.content: Confidential slide decks recovered and converted without any server interaction.

sections.title: Convert Slides at Lightning Speed
sections.content: A 60-slide PDF converted to PowerPoint in under 10 seconds with zero upload time.

faqs.a: Content is mapped to slides; some layout adjustments may be needed.

faqs.q: Can I edit the slides after?
faqs.a: Yes, the .pptx file is fully editable in PowerPoint or Google Slides.
No, convert as many pages as your RAM allows.

faqs.q: Does it work with image-heavy PDFs?
faqs.a: Yes, images are embedded in each slide.
